hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('command',''); print('BLOCK: Use pnpm instead of npm in this monorepo') if cmd.strip().split()[0:1] == ['npm'] and 'npx' not in cmd else None" 2>/dev/null

python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('file_path',''); import subprocess; r=subprocess.run(['pnpm','typecheck'],capture_output=True,text=True) if fp.endswith(('.ts','.tsx')) else None; print((r.stdout+r.stderr)[-600:]) if r and (r.stdout+r.stderr).strip() else None" 2>/dev/null

python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('file_path',''); print('\u26a0\ufe0f  TEMPLATE SYNC REQUIRED: Run pnpm sync-templates (CLAUDE.md Rule 6)') if '/convex/' in fp else None" 2>/dev/null
